chapter_title.ar: باب بَيْعِ الْمَاءِ وَ مَنْعِ فُضُولِ الْمَاءِ مِنَ الْأَوْدِيَةِ وَ السُّيُولِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 135 – Selling the water and prevention of wasting the water from the valleys and the streams

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/368)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/368)

parts.text: مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ هِلَالٍ

text: قَضَى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فِي شُرْبِ النَّخْلِ بِالسَّيْلِ أَنَّ الْأَعْلَى يَشْرَبُ قَبْلَ الْأَسْفَلِ وَ يُتْرَكُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ إِلَى الْكَعْبَيْنِ ثُمَّ يُسَرَّحُ الْمَاءُ إِلَى الْأَسْفَلِ الَّذِي يَلِيهِ كَذَلِكَ حَتَّى تَنْقَضِيَ الْحَوَائِطُ وَ يَفْنَى الْمَاءُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah Bin Hilal, from Uqba Bin Khalid,

from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> judged regarding a waterway for the palm trees with the flow that the upper parts are irrigated before the lower, and the water is left up to the two ankles. Then the water is to be channelled to the lower parts which follow it. It should be like that until the gardens are irrigated and the water is depleted’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd Allah ibn Hilal from ‘Uqbah ibn Khalid who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, issued a judgment about water for palm trees from flood water that said, ’Those of the higher area drink before the lower ones, and water is left up to the anklebones; then water is allowed for the lower ones which is next until all gardens’ needs are met and water is depleted.’”
